kyc.title: KYC schema
kyc.description: Define separate KYC forms for individual and corporate customers (fields and required documents).
kyc.hint: JSON object with version, title, fields (types: text, textarea, number, date, select, checkbox), and requiredDocuments with code and label. Optional bilingual keys are supported: titleZh/titleEn, labelZh/labelEn, placeholderZh/placeholderEn, optionsZh/optionsEn. Must be valid JSON.
kyc.invalidJson: Invalid JSON. Fix syntax and try again.
kyc.adminOnlyHint: Only administrators can edit the schema. You can review the current definition below.

limits.title: Deposit & withdrawal limits
limits.description: Configure limits by KYC level (coming soon).
limits.placeholder: This section will let you set maximum deposit and withdrawal amounts based on customer verification level.

settings.title: Settings

appBranding.title: Branding
appBranding.description: Customize the sidebar name, browser tab title, and favicon.
appBranding.sidebarDescription: Shown at the top of the sidebar. Each language uses its own field; leave blank to hide the name for that language.
appBranding.hint: If the name for the current interface language is empty, nothing is shown in the sidebar.
appBranding.documentTitleDescription: Shown in the browser tab. Each language has its own title; leave blank to use the default app name.
appBranding.documentTitleHint: If the title for the current interface language is empty, the default name (Operations Console) is used.
appBranding.faviconDescription: Small icon in the browser tab. PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP, SVG, or ICO, up to 2 MB. Upload applies immediately.
appBranding.faviconRemoveConfirm: Remove the custom favicon and use the default icon?

backupRestore.title: Backup & Restore
backupRestore.description: Create backups of your database and restore from previous backups
backupRestore.databaseOnlyDesc: Backup only the SQLite database (fast, smaller file)
backupRestore.databaseAndFilesDesc: Complete backup including all receipts, payments, and expense images
backupRestore.restoreDatabaseOnlyDesc: Restore from a .db file (database backup only)
backupRestore.restoreDatabaseAndFilesDesc: Restore from a .zip file (database and all uploaded images)
backupRestore.invalidDbFile: Please choose a .db file for database-only restore.
backupRestore.invalidZipFile: Please choose a .zip file for database + files restore.
backupRestore.restoreWarning: Warning: Restoring will replace all current data. A safety backup will be created automatically.
backupRestore.restoreWarningDb: Warning: This will replace the current database. A safety backup will be created automatically.
backupRestore.restoreWarningFull: Warning: This will replace the database and all uploaded files (receipts, favicon, etc.). A database safety backup will be created automatically.
backupRestore.restoreConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore from this backup? This action cannot be undone.
backupRestore.restoreConfirmDb: Restore from this .db backup? All current database data will be replaced. This cannot be undone.
backupRestore.restoreConfirmFull: Restore from this .zip backup? The database and uploaded files will be replaced. This cannot be undone.
backupRestore.restoreSafetyListDesc: Select a safety backup (created automatically before restores).
backupRestore.restoreSafetyConfirm: Restore from the latest safety backup? This will overwrite current data.
backupRestore.restoreSafetyError: Failed to restore from safety backup
backupRestore.restoreSuccess: Restore completed successfully. A database safety backup was created.

resetIds.title: Reset ID Counters
resetIds.description: Reset auto-increment ID counters for tables. Tables must be empty.
resetIds.resetWarning: Only empty tables can be reset. Tables with data will be skipped.

notifications.title: Notifications Management
notifications.clearAllWarning: ⚠️ Warning: Clearing notifications will permanently delete all notifications for all users. This action cannot be undone.
notifications.clearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear ALL notifications for ALL users? This action cannot be undone.

debug.title: Database Debugging
debug.description: View database schema and execute read-only SQL queries

debug.onlySelectAllowed: Only SELECT and PRAGMA queries are allowed for security reasons

settings.adminOnly: This page is only accessible to administrators

approvals.title: Approval Requests
approvals.noPermission: You don't have permission to view approval requests.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.notifyApprovalApprovedDesc: Get notified when your approval requests are approved
notifications.notifyApprovalRejectedDesc: Get notified when your approval requests are rejected
notifications.notifyApprovalPendingDesc: Get notified when someone requests your approval
notifications.notifyOrderAssignedDesc: Get notified when an order is assigned to you
notifications.notifyOrderUnassignedDesc: Get notified when you're unassigned from an order
notifications.notifyOrderCreatedDesc: Get notified when any new order is created
notifications.notifyOrderCompletedDesc: Get notified when any order is completed
notifications.notifyOrderCancelledDesc: Get notified when any order is cancelled
notifications.notifyOrderDeletedDesc: Get notified when any order is deleted (recommended)
notifications.notifyExpenseCreatedDesc: Get notified when any new expense is created
notifications.notifyExpenseDeletedDesc: Get notified when any expense is deleted (recommended)
notifications.notifyTransferCreatedDesc: Get notified when any new transfer is created
notifications.notifyTransferDeletedDesc: Get notified when any transfer is deleted (recommended)

notificationPreferences.title: Notification Preferences
notificationPreferences.description: Manage your notification preferences and choose which alerts you want to receive

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your account, appearance, and security settings.

account.title: Change password
account.description: Update your login password. If two-factor authentication is enabled, you'll also need a code from your authenticator app.
account.emailDescription: Update the email used to sign in and receive password reset codes.
account.emailInUse: That email is already in use.
account.emailSameAsCurrent: New email must be different from your current email.
account.emailChangeError: Could not update email. Please try again.
account.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
account.passwordChangeError: Could not update password. Please try again.

preferences.previewDesc: See how your color choices look before saving.
preferences.presetThemesDesc: Pick one of the built-in themes below. Changes preview instantly.
preferences.customizeDesc: Fine-tune individual colors beyond the presets.

referenceRates.title: Reference rates
referenceRates.pageDescription: Desk reference rates for quoting. PKR/USDT is derived from PKR/AED and AED benchmarks; HKD/PKR and CNY/PKR are cross-rates from PKR/USDT. HKD/USDT row is benchmark-only. Separate from currency strength settings in orders.
referenceRates.sectionBenchmarkDesc: AED and HKD base buy/sell are used in formulas only (AED does not show final buy/sell here).
referenceRates.sectionChainDesc: Sell = PKR/AED sell × AED base sell × (1 + markup). Buy = sell × (1 − markdown).
referenceRates.benchmarkHint: Benchmark for cross-rate formulas; not quoted directly.
referenceRates.chainHint: Spreads applied to the PKR/USDT chain (no separate base price).
referenceRates.panelDecimalsHint: Buy/sell rounding on the floating rates panel (0–8).
referenceRates.sectionDerivedDesc: Computed rates; configure decimal places for the floating panel.
referenceRates.previewDescription: Buy and sell rates computed from your bases and spread percentages.
referenceRates.useDualBase: Use separate buy & sell base rates
referenceRates.pairCardHint: Choose one base mode. Spreads apply to the selected mode.
referenceRates.sendTelegramHint: Save first, check the live preview, then send the last saved rates to the group chat.
referenceRates.readOnlyHint: You do not have permission to edit reference rates.
